How to organize files automatically on macOS

Keeping files organized on macOS becomes difficult over time, especially with cluttered Downloads and Desktop folders.

Manually sorting files is slow and repetitive. That’s why many users look for a way to organize files automatically.

Automatic file organization on Mac

Foldora is an AI file organizer that automatically organizes files on macOS. It analyzes your files locally and sorts them into structured folders.

  • Sort files into clean folders
  • Rename files automatically
  • Works fully offline (no cloud)

How it works

  1. Select a folder (like Downloads)
  2. Click organize
  3. Preview and apply changes

Is it safe?

Foldora does not upload your files. Everything runs locally on your Mac. You stay in control with preview before applying changes.

Learn more

  • Clean Downloads folder
  • Organize files on Windows
  • Rename files automatically

👉 Organize your files automatically on macOS with Foldora.
